title: Automated Email Notifications to Non-Users
excerpt: I’m looking to use Monday Forms so that people can fill out a request, and that request will then notify a bunch of stakeholders across the business (in different departments, who may not use Monday themselves) of the ne…

posts.author: MichaelKinder (Michael)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking to use Monday Forms so that people can fill out a request, and that request will then notify a bunch of stakeholders across the business (in different departments, who may not use Monday themselves) of the new request, in one fluid automation.

My company uses Outlook. Assume all desired email recipients I want to notify don’t have Monday licenses themselves. Can this be done?
